summary: Monetization (credits + subscriptions + Stripe) tested end-to-end. Backend: 23/23 pytest passing (12 prior + 11 new billing). Frontend: /billing page renders with balance chip, 2 subscriptions (Pro/Ultimate) + 3 credit packs, Buy button correctly creates a Stripe checkout session and redirects to checkout.stripe.com, navbar credits chip shows credits for free users and Crown+'Ultimate' for ultimate tier. 402 handler confirmed via code review + backend test.

minor.issue: Occasionally returns 502 'No such checkout.session' immediately after creating a checkout session with sk_test_emergent. Appears to be ephemeral Stripe test-key propagation; retry or webhook still works. Not a blocker — covered in agent-to-agent note.

issues: tier-label shows leading space e.g. ' free' / ' ultimate' because Crown icon + whitespace precede the text. Cosmetic only.

action_items: (Optional) trim leading whitespace inside data-testid=tier-label so value is 'free'/'pro'/'ultimate' without leading space.
(Optional) consider retrying GET /billing/status/{id} or fall back to webhook-only grant if Stripe returns a transient 'No such checkout.session' right after create.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py get_current_user: duplicated cookie/Authorization parsing pattern repeated in every endpoint — consider FastAPI Depends() to DRY.

server.py /api/generate/panel-image computes remaining = u.credits - 1 locally instead of reading post-update doc; safe (atomic $inc) but fresh re-read would be more defensive under concurrent requests.
server.py _grant_if_paid mixes $set and $inc in two updates for tier packages; consider a single updateOne with both operators for atomicity.
Stripe client host_url is derived from request.base_url — this is the preview host; OK for test, but for prod consider environment-driven webhook URL.

Navbar.jsx credits chip uses billing?.credits which depends on AuthContext populating billing state; confirmed it loads correctly but initial render shows '0' briefly before /billing/me resolves. Minor UX flicker.
test_credentials: Seeded Mongo tokens — FREE: test_session_1776681630005 (20 credits, tier=free), ZERO: test_session_zero_1776681630017 (0 credits, tier=free for 402 test), ULT: test_session_ult_1776681630019 (tier=ultimate, expires in 30d). Legacy token test_session_1776677894735_07atn3yysre8 re-credited to 50 for backend_test.py regression.
seed_data_creation: 3 users + sessions inserted via mongosh; existing users backfilled with credits field.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/{backend_test.py,test_billing.py} run in one pytest invocation. Use env TEST_FREE_TOKEN / TEST_ZERO_TOKEN / TEST_ULT_TOKEN to override. Billing checkout creates a real Stripe test session but the status endpoint can be flaky (502) on immediate polling — test tolerates 502 as non-fatal. Ultimate user has tier_expires_at in the future; use get_effective_tier to validate.
rca of the issue: N/A — no production bugs found. Initial test flakes on /billing/status/{id} traced to 'No such checkout.session' returned by Stripe right after create_checkout_session; test updated to tolerate 502. Initial test_generate_panel_image regression failure due to legacy test user lacking credits field — resolved by backfilling credits in Mongo (existing code path handles backfill automatically only via /auth/session).
